from sympy import exp, sinh, Piecewise, symbols
from sympy.core.cache import clear_cache
import traceback
clear_cache()
x, y, z = symbols('x y z', real=True)
expr = exp(sinh(Piecewise((x, y > x), (y, True)) / z))
print(expr)
try:
    print(expr.subs({1: 1.0}))
except Exception:
    traceback.print_exc()
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import exp, Piecewise, sinh, symbols
from sympy.core.cache import clear_cache

clear_cache()
x, y, z = symbols('x y z', real=True)
p = Piecewise((x, y > x), (y, True))
e = exp(sinh(p/z))
print('expr:', e)
try:
    got = e.subs({1: 1.0})
    print('got:', got)
except Exception:
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc()
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.core.cache import clear_cache
for target in ('arg','sinh','exp'):
    clear_cache()
    x,y,z=symbols('x y z', real=True)
    arg=Piecewise((x,y>x),(y,True))/z
    obj={'arg':arg,'sinh':sinh(arg),'exp':exp(sinh(arg))}[target]
    print('\\nTARGET',target, 'original', repr(obj))
    try:
        got=obj.subs({1:1.0})
        print('got', repr(got), srepr(got))
        if target "'!= '"'arg': print('new arg', repr(got.args[0] if target=='sinh' else got.args[0].args[0]))
    except Exception as exc:
        print(type(exc), exc)
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import decimal, mpmath
from mpmath.libmp import from_str
from mpmath.libmp.backend import MPZ, BACKEND
from sympy import Float
print('backend', BACKEND, MPZ)
for s in ['.', '-.', '', '-']:
    for label, f in [('decimal.Decimal', decimal.Decimal), ('float', float), ('MPZ', MPZ), ('mpmath.from_str', from_str), ('sympy.Float', Float)]:
        try:
            v = f(s)
        except Exception as e:
            print(repr(s), label, 'RAISE', type(e).__name__, str(e))
        else:
            print(repr(s), label, '=>', repr(v))
    print()
PY
./.venv/bin/pip show mpmath | sed -n '1,12p'

import decimal, mpmath
from mpmath.libmp import from_str

from sympy import Float
print('backend', BACKEND, MPZ)
for s in ['.', '-.', '', '-']:
    for label, f in [('decimal.Decimal', decimal.Decimal), ('float', float), ('MPZ', MPZ), ('mpmath.from_str', from_str), ('sympy.Float', Float)]:
        try:
            v = f(s)
        except Exception as e:
            print(repr(s), label, 'RAISE', type(e).__name__, str(e))
        else:
            print(repr(s), label, '=>', repr(v))
    print()
PY

from sympy import exp, sinh, Piecewise, symbols
from sympy.core.cache import clear_cache

clear_cache()

from sympy import Piecewise, symbols

from sympy.core.cache import clear_cache

clear_cache()
x, y, z = symbols('x y z', real=True)
p = Piecewise((x, y > x), (y, True))
print('direct Mod:', (p/z) % 1)
clear_cache()
x, y, z = symbols('x y z', real=True)
p = Piecewise((x, y > x), (y, True))
expr = exp(sinh(p/z))
print('subs:', expr.subs({1: 1.0}))
clear_cache()

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import exp, Mod, Piecewise, sinh, symbols
from sympy.core.cache import clear_cache
clear_cache()
x, y, z = symbols('x y z', real=True)
p = Piecewise((x, y > x), (y, True))
print('direct:', repr((p/z) % 1))
e = exp(sinh(p/z))
got = e.subs({1: 1.0})
expected = exp(sinh(p*z**-1.0))
print('subs:', repr(got))
print('expected equal:', got == expected)
print('is_zero:', sinh(p*z**-1.0).is_zero)
PY"
